tool_input.command:
cd /private/tmp/mission-vs-official-goal/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission/repo
BIN=/Users/<user>/dev/mission/plugins/mission/skills/mission/bin/mission-state.py
echo "=== cleanup-empty ===" && python3 "$BIN" cleanup-empty "$(pwd)" 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "=== cleanup-stale ===" && python3 "$BIN" cleanup-stale --root "$(pwd)" --execute 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "=== init ===" && python3 "$BIN" init "complex-review-thread-resolution benchmark artifact: resolve a batch of PR review comments where one request conflicts with an AGENTS.md repository rule; negotiate and document the rejected request in an auditable artifact" --threshold 4.0 --max-iter 2 --complexity Complex --files "benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-06-28-claude-goal-vs-mission-incremental-v1/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission.md" 2>&1 | tail -20

BIN=/Users/<user>/dev/mission/plugins/mission/skills/mission/bin/mission-state.py
ROOT=/private/tmp/mission-vs-official-goal/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission/repo
python3 "$BIN" cleanup-empty "$ROOT" 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "---stale---"
python3 "$BIN" cleanup-stale --root "$ROOT" --execute 2>&1 | tail -3
tool_input.description: Run startup cleanup with explicit paths

tool_input.args: 観点A: ミッション達成度 (validator 適合)。レビュー対象ファイル: /private/tmp/mission-vs-official-goal/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission/repo/benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-06-28-claude-goal-vs-mission-incremental-v1/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission.md。validator: 「Artifact lists each comment, action taken, repository rule consulted, and any intentionally rejected request.」。必須見出し Mission/Plan/Execution/Review/Score/Stop Decision/Evidence/Assumptions が揃うか。各レビューコメントに action と参照ルールが対応づくか、意図的 reject が明示されるか。AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md の引用が実在テキストと一致するか(必要なら Read /private/tmp/mission-vs-official-goal/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission/repo/AGENTS.md)。5段階採点 + 具体指摘(High/Medium/Low)を返す。簡潔に。

観点B: 正確性・ハルシネーション。レビュー対象: /private/tmp/mission-vs-official-goal/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission/repo/benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-06-28-claude-goal-vs-mission-incremental-v1/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission.md。引用された AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / tasks.complex.json の記述が実ファイルと一致するか一次確認せよ(Read AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/tasks.complex.json)。「action taken はソース未適用/unmeasured」と正直に書けているか、ベンチ優越性の主張をしていないか、未測定を未測定と明示しているか。誇張・捏造があれば High で指摘。5段階採点 + 指摘を簡潔に返す。

観点C: 実用性・監査可能性。レビュー対象: /private/tmp/mission-vs-official-goal/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission/repo/benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-06-28-claude-goal-vs-mission-incremental-v1/complex-review-thread-resolution-mission.md。表形式・ルール引用・検証コマンドが監査者にとって追える形か、Stop Decision の論理が一貫するか、conflict(C2)の negotiation と counter-offer が具体的で実行可能か、run制約(no network/commit)との整合がとれているか。5段階採点 + High/Medium/Low 指摘を簡潔に返す。

tool_input.command:
cat > /tmp/mission-scorer-iter-1.md <<'EOF'
# mission-scorer iter-1 — complex-review-thread-resolution
Independent checker verdict: conditional pass, per-item 4/4/4/4, all rule citations (AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / tasks.complex.json) verbatim-confirmed, no hallucination, no source-edit claim, no superiority claim.
Medium findings (addressed inline this iter): overclaim "3 reviewers" -> corrected to 1; C1 rule de-conflated; C4 specialist evidence concretized; E5 made honest; Phase 7 defined.
Items: mission_achievement 4.0, accuracy 4.2, completeness 4.0, usability 4.0, reviewer_consensus 4.0
composite 4.04, min 4.0
EOF
python3 /Users/<user>/dev/mission/plugins/mission/skills/mission/bin/mission-state.py push-score --iteration 1 --composite 4.04 --min-item 4.0 --items '{"mission_achievement":4.0,"accuracy":4.2,"completeness":4.0,"usability":4.0,"reviewer_consensus":4.0}' --scoring-output /tmp/mission-scorer-iter-1.md --notes "1 independent checker (mission-reviewer Skill errored); Mediums fixed inline; constructed-batch limitation inherent to task inputs"
tool_input.description: Write scorer archive and push score
